recoveryToken.description: Deletion recovery capability returned once. Store it outside logs and model context until cleanup completes.

TransferUrl.description: Absolute HTTP or HTTPS URL for a short-lived byte-transfer capability.

email.description: Verified user email, present for user credentials.

deploymentUrl.description: Immutable public URL bound to the selected deploy while it is retained.

url.description: Stable public Web Yard alias selected by the operation.

cleanUrls.description: Whether extensionless HTML resolution is enabled.

deploymentUrl.description: Immutable public URL bound to this exact deploy while it is retained.

isCurrent.description: Whether the public alias selects this deploy.

info.description: The stable API for durable object storage and scoped access. Stored files do not expire when a transfer grant or public capability expires.

onboardingProgress.description: Derived browser onboarding state, not a stable versioned API resource.
